top_signals.title: Germany Should Stop Shutting Off Coal Plants, Grid Operator Says
top_signals.summary: Germany should stop further closures of coal-fed power plants for now to safeguard electricity supplies amid the expansion of renewable generation, grid operator Amprion GmbH urged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump Administration Advances New California Oil Lease Plans
top_signals.summary: The Bureau of Land Management is giving California another chance to weigh in on oil and gas leasing—whether the state wants it or not. On Thursday, the BLM opened a 30-day public scoping period for 50 federal oil and gas parcels covering roughly 36,000 acres across Kern, Kings, Fresno, and San Luis Obispo counties. The parcels could be included in a future federal lease sale, marking the latest step in the Trump administration's effort to revive domestic energy development on public lands. If this feels familiar, that's because it is. Just…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BHP seeks to restart Cerro Colorado mine with $1.5B investment
top_signals.summary: The copper mine has been closed since late 2023 after it was denied its water permit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
